description_long: This is a medium-sized ceramic vase with a classic, slightly angular silhouette and a wide, flared rim. The body of the vase is predominantly white, adorned on one side with a detailed floral motif featuring pink blossoms and green foliage, reminiscent of traditional East Asian decorative styles. The floral design is concentrated on the front, while the back and sides remain mostly plain, highlighting the contrast between decorated and undecorated surfaces. The vase has a narrow base that gently widens toward the middle before tapering again at the neck, giving it a balanced and elegant profile. The surface appears smooth and hard, with a matte to slightly glossy finish that subtly reflects light. This vase would be suitable for display in refined urban settings such as parks, plazas, or upscale residential entryways.
description: A white ceramic vase with a flared rim and pink floral motif on one side, featuring a smooth, slightly glossy surface. Its elegant, angular form and decorative design make it ideal for display in urban environments.
description_view_0: Front view showing the prominent pink floral motif and green foliage on the white vase body.
description_view_1: Side view with partial visibility of the floral design, transitioning to mostly plain white surface.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain white surface with no visible decoration or pattern.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a hint of the floral motif, mostly plain white with some pink accents near the edge.
